steps.title: Use the unorthodox clue
steps.content: Ray created high-contrast photographs with blurred and distorted elements, features generally treated as flaws. The next sentence calls his work unorthodox, so the blank needs a word meaning he resisted normal conventions.

steps.title: Reject weaker verbs
steps.content: Choice A means examined or evaluated. Choice C means followed or honored. Choice D means stopped something from happening. The remaining verb means deliberately resisted or disobeyed, matching Ray's unconventional photography. The answer is B.
